'''âth-z-r''' ('''kathazar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stake|stake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stake|stake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| kathazar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazar|thithazar]] || [[word:jithazar|jithazar]] || [[word:shithazar|shithazar]] || [[word:kithazar|kithazar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazar|thuthuthazar]] || [[word:jujuthazar|jujuthazar]] || [[word:shushuthazar|shushuthazar]] || [[word:kukuthazar|kukuthazar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazar|thuthazar]] || [[word:juthazar|juthazar]] || [[word:shuthazar|shuthazar]] || [[word:kuthazar|kuthazar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazar|thuthazar]] || [[word:juthazar|juthazar]] || [[word:shuthazar|shuthazar]] || [[word:kuthazar|kuthazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazar|thethazar]] || [[word:jethazar|jethazar]] || [[word:shethazar|shethazar]] || [[word:kethazar|kethazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothazar|thothothazar]] || [[word:jojothazar|jojothazar]] || [[word:shoshothazar|shoshothazar]] || [[word:kokothazar|kokothazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazar|thothazar]] || [[word:jothazar|jothazar]] || [[word:shothazar|shothazar]] || [[word:kothazar|kothazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazar|thothazar]] || [[word:jothazar|jothazar]] || [[word:shothazar|shothazar]] || [[word:kothazar|kothazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthazar|thĂŠthazar]] || [[word:jĂŠthazar|jĂŠthazar]] || [[word:shĂŠthazar|shĂŠthazar]] || [[word:kĂŠthazar|kĂŠthazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazar|thathathazar]] || [[word:jajathazar|jajathazar]] || [[word:shashathazar|shashathazar]] || [[word:kakathazar|kakathazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazar|thathazar]] || [[word:jathazar|jathazar]] || [[word:shathazar|shathazar]] || [[word:kathazar|kathazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazar|thathazar]] || [[word:jathazar|jathazar]] || [[word:shathazar|shathazar]] || [[word:kathazar|kathazar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathazar|shathazar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathazar|goshathazar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathazar|gokishathazar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathazarnĂŒ|shathazarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathazarnknĂŒ|goshathazarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazarnĂŒ|gokishathazarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathazarshĂ«|shathazarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathazarnkshĂ«|goshathazarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathazarshĂ«|gokishathazarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazaro|shathazaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazarnkro|goshathazarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazaro|gokishathazaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazarmu|shathazarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazarnkmu|goshathazarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazarmu|gokishathazarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathazarsher|shathazarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathazarnksher|goshathazarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathazarsher|gokishathazarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathazarng|shathazarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathazarnkng|goshathazarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathazarng|gokishathazarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathazarya|shathazarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathazarnkya|goshathazarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathazarya|gokishathazarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathazaryam|shathazaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathazarnkyam|goshathazarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathazaryam|gokishathazaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazarnĂŒshĂ«|shathazarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathazarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathazarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazarnĂŒro|shathazarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazarnknĂŒro|goshathazarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazarnĂŒro|gokishathazarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazarnĂŒmu|shathazarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazarnknĂŒmu|goshathazarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazarnĂŒmu|gokishathazarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazarshĂ«nĂŒ|shathazarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathazarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathazarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazarshĂ«ro|shathazarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazarnkshĂ«ro|goshathazarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazarshĂ«ro|gokishathazarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazarshĂ«mu|shathazarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazarnkshĂ«mu|goshathazarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazarshĂ«mu|gokishathazarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazaronĂŒ|shathazaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazarnkronĂŒ|goshathazarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazaronĂŒ|gokishathazaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazaroshĂ«|shathazaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazarnkroshĂ«|goshathazarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazaroshĂ«|gokishathazaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazaromu|shathazaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazarnkromu|goshathazarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazaromu|gokishathazaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazarmunĂŒ|shathazarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazarnkmunĂŒ|goshathazarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazarmunĂŒ|gokishathazarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazarmushĂ«|shathazarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazarnkmushĂ«|goshathazarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazarmushĂ«|gokishathazarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazarmuro|shathazarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazarnkmuro|goshathazarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazarmuro|gokishathazarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
